commit_scope: Admit full mutable record aliasing to the fourth-arm floor by preserving band-source top-level let snapshots.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel-emit.fk form-stdlib/form-parse.fk form-stdlib/form-flatten.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-flatten-indirect-call-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh record record-blueprint record-fold record-field-access list-of-record-reduction
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh higher-order-fn-arg branch-choice-order channel-interface jit-lower full-jit-lower model-vitality record
local_validation.notes: macOS local validation passed. record-band now returns 176 across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with validate.sh reporting fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok / 0 divergent. The record family gate reports PASS-4WAY for record, record-blueprint, record-fold, record-field-access, and list-of-record-reduction. Adjacent top-level snapshot-sensitive and JIT rows also remained PASS-4WAY. The full aggregate validate run reports fourth arm: 204 band(s) four-way, 604 ok, 0 divergent. One earlier focused validate run printed a non-fatal cache rename warning while exiting 0 and proving the four-way result; an earlier aggregate attempt exposed form-flatten-indirect-call regression from over-broad single-source snapshots, which was repaired by restoring flt-src-fns to the inline path and then revalidated.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy performed for this focused Form manifest slice. No Android physical validation is claimed here; the active Android receipt lane is separate and this change is in the Form fourth-arm source flattener.

phase_gate.gate: Full record-band validates across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu while existing record carrier rows and representative JIT/top-level rows remain four-way.
phase_gate.next: Carry record-shaped object/class construction and method dispatch through the BML/Hati lanes without reopening the record carrier floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The fourth-arm manifest floor moves to 204 admitted rows by admitting full record-band at verdict 176, and the full Form suite now reports 604 ok / 0 divergent. The band-source top-level walker now snapshots lets once through the RAM organ, so reads before record_set keep their source-time value and record_new preserves shared mutable identity. Module top-level constants and flt-src-fns single-source self-tests continue to inline, preserving the existing prelude/env and flattener-test contracts.

representative adjacent gates report PASS-4WAY for higher-order-fn-arg, branch-choice-order, channel-interface, jit-lower, full-jit-lower, model-vitality, and record.
